ANIWAN POWER delivers advanced electrical testing, energy optimization, power quality analysis, MEP solutions and Solar EPC services for modern industries and infrastructure.

Focused on precision, reliability and sustainability, we help businesses build smarter and more efficient power ecosystems.

Who We Are

About
Aniwan
Power

ANIWAN POWER is a trusted engineering and power solutions company delivering reliable, performance-focused and sustainable energy solutions through advanced technical expertise.

Our Purpose

Vision & Mission

Vision

To become a trusted leader in intelligent power infrastructure solutions, enabling industries to operate with greater efficiency, safety and sustainability across all critical sectors.

Mission

To deliver precision-driven engineering solutions with unwavering reliability, continuous innovation and a deep commitment to sustainability, creating lasting value for every client and project.

What Drives Us

Our Core Values

Precision

Reliability

Safety

Innovation

Sustainability

Technology & Sustainability

Built For The Future

Using advanced diagnostics, smart monitoring systems and sustainable engineering practices, we create efficient and future-ready power solutions for critical industries.

Advanced VLF & Tan Delta diagnostic technology

Solar EPC with O&M for long-term sustainability

Real-time power quality monitoring systems

Energy optimization reducing operational losses

What We Deliver

Smart Power
Solutions

Comprehensive electrical engineering and power solutions, from precision diagnostics to sustainable infrastructure deployment.

01

Electrical Testing Services

Comprehensive HV, MV and LV testing with advanced diagnostics for cables, transformers and insulation systems.

►HV, MV & LV Cable Testing
►VLF Testing
►Insulation Resistance (IR)
►Hi-Pot Testing
►Sheath Integrity Testing
►Transformer Ratio Test (TTR)
►Winding Resistance Test
►Oil Testing — BDV & DGA
►Tan Delta Testing
►Insulation Diagnostics
02

Power Quality Solutions

Identifying and resolving power quality issues for efficient and stable operations across industrial and commercial environments.

►Harmonic Analysis
►Load Monitoring
►Voltage Disturbance Analysis
►Current Disturbance Analysis
►Energy Audits
03

Power Management

Optimizing power consumption and reducing losses through intelligent energy management strategies and monitoring.

►Energy Optimization
►Demand Control
►System Efficiency Improvement
►Power Loss Reduction
04

Power Analyzer Services

Advanced real-time monitoring and data-driven performance analysis for comprehensive power system diagnostics.

►Real-time Power Monitoring
►Data Logging & Reporting
►Performance Analysis
►Troubleshooting & Diagnostics
05

MEP Services

End-to-end mechanical, electrical and plumbing engineering solutions for commercial, industrial and infrastructure projects.

►Electrical Design & Engineering
►Installation & Commissioning
►Maintenance Services
►Infrastructure Support
06

Solar EPC

Complete solar engineering, procurement and construction from initial design to long-term operation and maintenance.

►Solar Design & Engineering
►Equipment Procurement
►Installation & Commissioning
►Operation & Maintenance (O&M)
